game_info.title: To The Moon - Memory Traversal
game_info.concept:
A story-driven experience about two doctors traversing backwards through a dying man's memories to artificially fulfill his last wish. Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts have peculiar jobs: They give people another chance to live, all the way from the very beginning... but only in their patients' heads.

Due to the severity of the operation, the new life becomes the last thing the patients remember before drawing their last breath. Thus, the operation is only done to people on their deathbeds, to fulfill what they wish they had done with their lives, but didn’t.

This particular story follows their attempt to fulfill the dream of an elderly man, Johnny. With each step back in time, a new fragment of Johnny's past is revealed. As the two doctors piece together the puzzled events that spanned a life time, they seek to find out just why the frail old man chose his dying wish to be what it is.

And Johnny's last wish is, of course... to go to the moon.

Key Features

  • A unique & non-combat story-driven experience
  • Innovative mix between adventure game elements and classic RPG aesthetics
  • Acclaimed original soundtrack that closely ties to the story
  • An espresso execution with zero filler and no time drains
game_info.description: Journey through Johnny's fading memories as Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts. Navigate through fragmented memory rooms, collecting memory orbs to unlock deeper layers of Johnny's past. Each memory reveals a piece of his story and brings you closer to understanding his final wish—to go to the moon. Avoid temporal distortions that threaten to corrupt the memories, and solve the mystery before time runs out.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move the doctor character through memory spaces
Space: Interact with memory orbs and examine objects
Z: Use temporal stabilizer to slow down time distortions
Shift: Sprint for faster movement

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and memory orb collection mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate through rooms and collect orbs to progress through the story.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move systematically through each memory room, collecting all visible memory orbs while avoiding temporal distortions. Use optimal pathfinding to reach orbs quickly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully collect sufficient memory orbs to unlock all memory layers and reach the final revelation. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN when the story is complete.
TEST_1.description: Testing basic movement and memory orb collection mechanics. Validates that the player can navigate through rooms and collect orbs to progress through the story.
TEST_1.strategy: Move systematically through each memory room, collecting all visible memory orbs while avoiding temporal distortions. Use optimal pathfinding to reach orbs quickly.
TEST_1.expected: Successfully collect sufficient memory orbs to unlock all memory layers and reach the final revelation. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN when the story is complete.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing win condition through optimal gameplay. Implements the most efficient strategy to complete the game by collecting all necessary memory orbs while managing temporal distortions.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use sprint when safe, collect orbs in order of proximity, avoid distortions when possible, and use temporal stabilizer strategically. Progress through all memory layers efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Win the game by collecting all required memory orbs across all layers, revealing Johnny's complete story and his connection to the moon. Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_2.expected: Win the game by collecting all required memory orbs across all layers, revealing Johnny's complete story and his connection to the moon. Achieves GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing temporal distortion avoidance and temporal stabilizer mechanics. Validates that the player can survive by managing threats and using defensive abilities.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Focus on avoiding temporal distortions, use temporal stabilizer frequently, and collect orbs cautiously. Test the health/integrity system by intentionally getting close to distortions.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully navigate through multiple memory layers while maintaining sufficient memory integrity. Demonstrates effective use of defensive mechanics.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing random exploration patterns to validate game robustness and ensure no soft-locks or edge cases. Simulates a new player exploring without optimal strategy.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Move in semi-random patterns, occasionally collect orbs, sometimes sprint, sometimes use abilities randomly. Tests game stability under unpredictable player behavior.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Game remains stable and functional regardless of input patterns. Either progresses toward win condition or reaches fail state naturally without errors.
